name: CLX - MGA Insurance Video Review Templates Seed v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. One-time admin trigger via INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET. Seeds 12 video review templates into video_review_templates (vertical_id='insurance'). Idempotent via UNIQUE(vertical_id, trigger_event) + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Mary POSTs once after deploy.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: $json.vertical_id, trigger_event: $json.trigger_event, script_template: $json.script_template, tone: $json.tone, cta_text: $json.cta_text, recommended_persona_id: $json.recommended_persona_id, recommended_look_id: $json.recommended_look_id, duration_seconds: $json.duration_seconds, active: $json.active }) }}

nodes.name: Insert Template
nodes.notes: Idempotent via UNIQUE(vertical_id, trigger_event) + Prefer resolution=ignore-duplicates.

parameters.jsCode:
const inserted = $('Build Templates').all().length;
return { json: { ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', templates_seeded: inserted, message: 'Insurance video review template seed complete. ' + inserted + ' templates upserted (idempotent).' } };
